_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Create risk-driven systems maintenance and updates processes
reference_document_element_description: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.449), AG-T-005 (AG, cosine: 0.442).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.459). Shared vocabulary: [maintenance, updates]. NICE-only terms [create, driven, processes, risk, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [cleanup, configuration, data, documentation, execute, job] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.886, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 7-word NICE element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Create risk-driven systems maintenance and updates processes" and "Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.485 ≈ STS 0.459 (gap 0.027). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [maintenance, updates] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [maintenance, updates]. NICE-only: [create, driven, processes, risk, systems]. WIDAI-only: [cleanup, configuration, data, documentation, execute, job].
